summary: Successfully tested and verified the Users Tab pagination fix for ecommbx banking platform. The fix correctly resolves the issue where users beyond #100 (like Josep De Las Heras Descarrega who was user #104) were not visible. All 16 backend tests passed, and frontend UI testing confirms all pagination features work correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Users tab shows correct count: 'Showing 50 of 110 users'
✅ Pagination shows 'Page 1 of 3' with default 50 per page
✅ Users per page dropdown works: 20, 50, 100 options
✅ Page navigation: First, Previous, Next, Last buttons all work
✅ KEY TEST: Search for 'josep' finds Josep De Las Heras Descarrega
✅ Search shows 'Found 1 users matching josep' message
✅ Pagination hidden during search, shown after clearing
✅ Click on user shows User Details panel
✅ Accounts tab shows all accounts correctly
✅ Josep visible in Accounts tab as well
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing 110 users
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Users tab pagination fix has been fully verified. Josep De Las Heras Descarrega (user #104) is now visible both via search and when navigating to page 3. All pagination features (20/50/100 per page, First/Prev/Next/Last buttons) work correctly. The fix successfully addresses the original issue where users beyond #100 were hidden.

fix_verification.original_issue: Some clients appeared in Accounts tab but NOT in Users tab. Josep (user #104) was hidden because backend limited users to 100.
fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Removed 100 user limit, 2) Added pagination (20, 50, 100 per page with default 50), 3) Search searches ALL users in database

verification_results.josep_found_via_search: YES - Found Josep De Las Heras Descarrega when searching 'josep'
verification_results.josep_visible_on_page_3: YES - Josep visible when navigating to page 3 of 3
verification_results.all_pagination_controls_work: YES - First, Previous, Next, Last, users per page dropdown all functional
